items.done_when: model_routes.yaml exists and includes GPT, Opus, Kimi, MiniMax, and final reviewer routing
Prompt includes objective, constraints, output schema, acceptance criteria, and stop conditions
Patch generated, diff captured, and validation commands run
Review packet template exists and is usable for final review
tests/test_harness_demo.py passes: add, is_even, slugify all pass

items.note: harness validation on real repo-useful code
items.done_when: tests/test_cat_stats.py passes: summarize() returns correct keys, active_mission_id=MP-CAT-000, total_missions>=3, total_active_beads>=4, --json output valid
